overview: The Wausau Plan Commission approved all action items on the agenda, including a rezoning request for 230 E Thomas Street from Neighborhood Mixed-Use to Two-Flat Residential, a Conditional Use Permit for a personal storage facility at 218 South 4th Street, and the 2027 Comprehensive Plan Public Participation Plan Draft (as amended). The commission also held a preliminary discussion on data center code amendments.

agenda.item: Public comment on agenda items and reading of the City of Wausau Public Comment Statement
Consideration of the minutes of the preceding meeting(s) - March 17, 2026 Regular Plan Commission Minutes
Public Hearing: Discussion on rezoning 230 E Thomas Street from NMU to TF-10 zoning district
Discussion and possible action on rezoning 230 E Thomas Street from NMU to TF-10 zoning district
Discussion and possible action on approving a Conditional Use Permit for 218 South 4th Street for Personal Storage Facility in Light Industrial Zoning District
Discussion and possible action approving the City of Wausau 2027 Comprehensive Plan Public Participation Plan Draft
Preliminary code amendment discussion - data centers

discussions.body: The minutes from the March 17, 2026 meeting were approved. Specific vote count and mover/seconder not recorded.

discussions.item: Rezoning 230 E Thomas Street from NMU to TF-10
discussions.body: A public hearing was held on the rezoning request. The commission subsequently approved the rezoning of 230 E Thomas Street from Neighborhood Mixed-Use to Two-Flat Residential zoning district. Specific vote count and mover/seconder not recorded.

discussions.item: Conditional Use Permit for 218 South 4th Street - Personal Storage Facility
discussions.body: The commission approved the Conditional Use Permit for Dunwoody Storage to construct a Personal Storage Facility at 218 South 4th Street in the Light Industrial Zoning District. Specific vote count and mover/seconder not recorded.

discussions.item: City of Wausau 2027 Comprehensive Plan Public Participation Plan Draft
discussions.body: The commission approved the 2027 Comprehensive Plan Public Participation Plan Draft as amended. Two votes were recorded indicating initial approval and then approval with amendments. Specific vote counts and mover/seconder not recorded.

discussions.item: Preliminary code amendment discussion - data centers
discussions.body: The commission held a preliminary discussion regarding potential code amendments related to data centers. This was a discussion item only with no action taken.

publicComment: Public comment on agenda items was on the agenda as the first item, along with reading of the City of Wausau Public Comment Statement.
actionItems: Rezoning of 230 E Thomas Street from NMU to TF-10 approved - to be forwarded to City Council
Conditional Use Permit for personal storage facility at 218 South 4th Street approved for Dunwoody Storage
2027 Comprehensive Plan Public Participation Plan Draft approved as amended
Data center code amendments to continue in future discussions
title: Wausau Plan Commission Meeting - 4/21/26
